asset_policy: Official promotional assets only. No leaks / fan art / AI / edits.

usage.match_by_tags: Each record has 3-5 lowercase tags. Match post topic -> tag set.
usage.n8n: Load library/index.json, filter by tags, return absolute_path.
usage.db: Import index.json into a table; index tags with GIN/array for lookups.
